datasources.title: Data Fibea ahorow
datasources.also_checked_by: Product page nso hwɛ mu denam
datasources.last_modified_t: Nsiesiei a etwa to a wɔyɛe wɔ afiri krataafa so wɔ {date} denam
datasources.incomplete_or_incorrect: If the data is incomplete or incorrect, you can complete or correct it by editing this page.
datasources.check_be_first: Be the first to check this product

info.images: Fa aduru no, nneɛma a wɔde yɛ, ne aduannuru ho nokwasɛm ahorow a emu da hɔ gu so na aboa afoforo ma wɔahu aduru no.
info.basic_info: Fa ade no ho nsɛm atitiriw te sɛ dodow, nea wɔde kyekyere, ne nea ɔyɛe no ma.
info.languages: Fa nneɛma din ne nkyerɛkyerɛmu a ɛwɔ kasa ahorow mu ka ho na ama nnipa pii a wɔde di dwuma no betumi anya afiri no.
info.ingredients: Kyerɛw nneɛma a ɛwɔ aduru no mu nyinaa. Eyi boa wɔn a wɔde di dwuma a wɔn ho yɛ wɔn hyew anaasɛ wɔn aduan a wɔpɛ.
info.nutrition: Hyehyɛ aduannuru a ɛwɔ 100g/ml biara mu sɛnea wɔakyerɛ wɔ nneɛma a wɔde ahyɛ mu no so. Eyi boa wɔn a wɔde di dwuma no ma wɔde nneɛma toto ho.
info.moderator_tools: These tools are only available to moderators. They allow for administrative actions like correcting the product barcode.
info.prices: Help track this product's price history on Open Prices.
info.comment: Sɛ wopɛ a, fa nsɛm bi ka ho de kyerɛkyerɛ nsakrae a woayɛ mu anaasɛ fa nsɛm a ɛfa ho foforo ma.
info.packaging: Describe each packaging component (bottle, cap, box, etc.) with its shape, material, and recycling instructions. You can add multiple components.

tooltips.serving_size: Saa bo yi boa ma wobu aduannuru biara ho akontaa sɛnea ɛfata wɔ dodow biara a wɔde ma mu. Sɛ nhwɛso no, 60 g, 60g anaa 60 G (pɛ nea edi kan no), 1000 ml anaa 1L
tooltips.ingredients_list: Keep the original order. Indicate the percentage when specified. Separate with a comma or hyphen and use parentheses for ingredients of an ingredient.
tooltips.categories: Kyerɛ ɔfã pɔtee a ɛsen biara nkutoo. Wɔde awofo akuw ahorow bɛka ho ara kwa. Sɛ nhwɛso no, ‘Sardines a ɛwɔ ngodua ngo mu’, ‘Orange nsu a efi concentrate mu’.
tooltips.product_name: Aguade no din ne edin titiriw a wɔatintim wɔ nneɛma a wɔde ahyɛ mu no so. Ebetumi ayɛ aguadi agyiraehyɛde a wɔakyerɛw din wɔ mmara mu. Sɛ nhwɛso no, ‘Nesquik’, ‘Tomato Ketchup’. Mfa brand no nka din no ho
tooltips.brand_name: Fa ade no brands nyinaa hyɛ mu. Ɛsɛ sɛ wodi kan hyɛ ahyɛnsode titiriw a mpɛn pii no wɔda no adi pefee wɔ anim pack no so no mu. Sɛ nhwɛso no, ‘Nutella, ‘Oreo, Mondelez’.
tooltips.quantity: Kɔpi bo a wɔakyerɛ wɔ ade no so no na mma wo werɛ mmfi unit ahorow no. Sɛ nhwɛso no, 230g, 6(ma nkesua 6), 3 x 150g (ma ade a nnaka 3 wom, emu biara yɛ 150g).
tooltips.labels: Su biara a ɛwɔ ade no ho **a ɛyɛ nokwasɛm** na ɛsono no wɔ mfuw afoforo no ho. Sɛ nhwɛso no, 'Nutri-Score, NOVA…', 'Wɔyɛɛ no Belgium, wɔyɛɛ no Brittany…', 'ISO 9001, ISO 22000…'.
tooltips.stores: Fa sotɔɔ a wotɔɔ ade no wom no hyɛ mu. Sɛ nhwɛso no, ‘Carrefour’, ‘Walmart’, ‘Lidl’.
tooltips.origins: Fa nneɛma biara a ɛkyerɛ baabi a efi a wubetumi ahu wɔ nneɛma a wɔde kyekyere nneɛma no so ka ho. Ɛnsɛ sɛ wohaw wo ho wɔ mfiase a wɔakyerɛ tẽẽ wɔ nneɛma a wɔde yɛ aduan no mu no ho. Sɛ nhwɛso no, ‘Nantwinam a efi Argentina’, ‘Soya no mfi Europa Aman Nkabom no mu’.
tooltips.traceability_code: Wɔ ɔfa yi mu no, wobɛtumi de mmara a ɛfa nneɛma a wɔde ahyɛ mu agyiraeɛhyɛdeɛ, agyiraeɛhyɛdeɛ a ɛkyerɛ sɛ obi hu anaa akwahosan agyiraeɛhyɛdeɛ ho ahyɛ mu.
tooltips.countries: Aman a wobetumi anya ade no kɛse (a sotɔɔ ahorow a wɔyɛ amannɔne nneɛma ho adwuma titiriw nka ho).
tooltips.product_type: Select the type of product: Food, Beauty, Pet Food, or Other.
tooltips.empty_fiber: Enter a hyphen (-) if the value is not present on the packaging.

edit.nutrition_issues_description: We have detected some potential issues with the nutritional information you provided. Please review the following warnings and make any necessary corrections before saving your changes.
edit.search_languages: Hwehwɛ kasa ahorow a wode bɛka ho
edit.no_languages_found: Kasa biara nni hɔ a wɔanhu
edit.name: Name

packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_label: Quantity of product contained per unit
packaging_component.all_listed: All packaging components have been listed
packaging_component.number_of_units_desc: Enter the number of packaging units of the same shape and material contained in the product.
packaging_component.shape_desc: Enter the shape name listed in the recycling instructions if they are available, or select a shape.
packaging_component.material_desc: Enter the specific material if it can be determined (a material code inside a triangle can often be found on packaging parts), or a generic material (for instance plastic or metal) if you are unsure.
packaging_component.recycling_desc: Enter recycling instructions only if they are listed on the product.
packaging_component.weight_measured_desc: Remove any remaining food and wash and dry the packaging part before weighting. If possible, use a scale with 0.1g or 0.01g precision.
packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_desc: Enter the net weight or net volume and indicate the unit (for example g or ml).
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_desc: Write here the packaging information and/or the recycling instructions that are present on the product.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_list: List all packaging parts separated by a comma or line feed, with their amount (e.g. 1 or 6) type (e.g. bottle, box, can), material (e.g. plastic, metal, aluminium) and if available their size (e.g. 33cl) and recycling instructions.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_specificity: Try to be as specific as possible. For plastic, please indicate if it is opaque or transparent, colored, PET or PEHD.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_combination: Data from this field will be combined with any data provided for each packaging part. It is possible to provide one or the other, or both.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_examples: 1 plastic film to discard, 1 FSC carboard box to recycle, 6 1.5L transparent PET plastic bottles to recycle, 6 colored opaque plastic caps, 12 33cl aluminium cans
packaging_component.packaging_photo_desc: Photos of the packaging info and recycling instructions help to verify the data.
packaging_component.multiple_uploads_guidance: With Chrome, Firefox and Safari, you can select multiple pictures (product, ingredients, nutrition facts etc.) by clicking them while holding the Ctrl key pressed to add them all in one shot.

edit.origins: Origin of the product and/or its ingredients
edit.product_page_url: Link to the product page on the official site of the producer

edit.legal_warning_photos_1: Mfa mfonini ahorow a wunni anaasɛ wunni hokwan sɛ wode bɛhyɛ so. Sɛ wode mfonini ahorow a wɔagye hokwan to so a wunnyaa kwan a, ɛyɛ mmara so bu na ebetumi ama wɔagyae wo akontaabu no.
edit.legal_warning_photos_2: Fa w’ankasa mfonini anaa nea wowɔ ho kwan pefee sɛ wode bedi dwuma nkutoo na fa gu so.

explore.trending_products_desc: Hwɛ nneɛma a wɔrehwɛ na wɔresiesie no kɛse mprempren.
explore.popular_categories_desc: Hwehwɛ nnuan ahorow a agye din sen biara wɔ yɛn database no mu.
explore.recently_added: Nnansa yi ara Wɔde Aka ho
explore.recently_added_desc: Hwɛ nneɛma a aba foforo a mpɔtam hɔfo de aka ho.
explore.contribute_now_desc: Boa ma Open Food Facts nkɔ anim denam nneɛma a wode bɛka ho anaa wobɛsesa, anaa nsɛmmisa a wobɛbua so.
explore.random_product_desc: Wote nka sɛ wowɔ anigye? Hu random product bi fi yɛn database no mu.
explore.learn_more_desc: Hwehwɛ sɛnea Open Food Facts yɛ adwuma ne sɛnea wubetumi aboa.
